name: 118o8
description:
She thinks the moon is made out of cheese.

She puts on a new ice cream everyday (different flavor every week).

This likely inspired her spawning with a random ice cream flavor in-game.

118o8 withnessed bluudud get hit by the car. this also means she saw him get sent flying. (which is what urged her to look for him. clinging onto hope that he’s alive somewhere. just very lost)

Everything after that is pretty much the same until 3 years later.

3 years later, when she was on her way home... ready to throw in the towel... she got hit by the same car that hit bluudud, which caused her to get in forsaken.

118o8 does not know it’s bluudud until she’s about to die by his hands, too speechless and terrified to say anything. or when she’s the last survivor alive. Not that it matters anyways because she immediately loses her memory when the round ends.

Her favorite color is lavender. Bluudud realized that so it's his favorite too.
creator: Cool Yuuga Aoyama.
